scripts.proto: pbjs -t static-module -w es6 -o src/generated/proto.js proto/tendermint/abci/types.proto proto/tendermint/crypto/keys.proto proto/tendermint/crypto/proof.proto proto/tendermint/types/params.proto proto/tendermint/types/validator.proto && pbts -o src/generated/proto.d.ts src/generated/proto.js
